channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bling, bling: Dodgers show off glittering World Series rings in pregame ceremony
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani and Clayton Kershaw joined their Los Angeles Dodgers teammates in sticking their fists out to show off their glittering World Series rings in a ceremony Friday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan State's 2nd-half rally sends Spartans past Ole Miss 73-70 as Izzo wins again in Sweet 16
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jase Richardson's hot shooting helped Michigan State overcome a poor start and move into another Elite Eight, though the Spartans need at least one more win for a real celebration. “We don’t put up any banners for Elite Eights,” coach Tom Izzo said.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Welcome Down Under: Russian-born Daria Kasatkina becomes an Australian citizen
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Russian-born tennis player Daria Kasatkina says she is switching allegiances to Australia after her application for permanent residency was accepted by the Australian government.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fans chant 'sell the team' at Rays home opener; team owner says talks are nothing new
item.description: The Rays pulled out a win in their new home for the season at Steinbrenner Field, but the ball club's future in Tampa Bay remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Alysa Liu delivers the US its first women's figure skating world championship in nearly 2 decades
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu became the first American women's figure skating world champion in nearly two decades Friday night, dethroning three-time defending champion Kaori Sakamoto with a brilliant free skate that earned her a standing ovation inside TD Garden.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennessee is heading back to the Elite Eight as defense clamps down in 78-65 win over Kentucky
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Zakai Zeigler had 18 points and 10 assists, and Tennessee outhustled and outplayed Kentucky on both ends of the court in a 78-65 victory Friday night that sent the Volunteers to a second consecutive Elite Eight of the NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lilia Vu has another bogey-free day and leads a pack of LPGA stars in Arizona
item.description: CHANDLER, Ariz. (AP) — Lilia Vu didn't feel her best on the range. She made up for that on the golf course Friday with an 8-under 64, giving her a two-shot lead over a group that includes Nelly Korda and Jeeno Thitikul in a Ford Championship packed with LPGA stars. Korda and Thitikul, the Nos.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pistons beat East-leading Cavaliers 133-122 and lock down 1st winning season since 2016
item.description: Tim Hardaway Jr. scored a season-high 32 points and the Detroit Pistons beat the Eastern Conference-leading Cleveland Cavaliers 133-122 on Friday night to guarantee their first winning season since 2016.
item.dc:creator: Dave Hogg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Deion Sanders walks back comments on son Shedeur Sanders' landing spot in NFL Draft
item.description: Deion Sanders said he won't wield his influence over Shedeur Sanders as the NFL Draft draws near. Coach Prime previously indicated he preferred his son land with certain franchises.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ties record with 62 for the lead in the Houston Open
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Scottie Scheffler opened with two straight birdies and was on his way Friday in the Houston Open, tying the Memorial Park record with an 8-under 62 for a one-shot lead when the second round was halted by darkness after a two-hour storm delay Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NCAA Tournament: Top storylines going into Saturday’s Texas Tech vs. Florida Elite 8 game
item.description: Texas Tech faces top-seeded Florida at Chase Center in San Francisco after dramatic comeback victory over Arkansas in regional semifinal.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump admin refers Maine's 'noncompliance with Title IX' to DOJ amid fight over trans athletes
item.description: The Trump administration on Friday announced it has referred Maine's "noncompliance with Title IX" to the Department of Justice for enforcement.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz lose for 14th time in last 15 games, 121-110
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Alperen Sengun had 33 points and 10 rebounds, Amen Thompson finished with 16 points, 10 rebounds and five assists, and the Houston Rockets beat the Utah Jazz 121-110 on Thursday night. The Jazz have now lost 14 of its last 15 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL prospect Desmond Watson seeks to become heaviest player drafted in league history
item.description: Football linemen are typical among the biggest athletes on a team, but former Florida defender Desmond Watson's size and strength are exceptional.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Opening Day 2025: White Sox have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers-Cubs opener in Tokyo averages more than 25 million viewers in Japan, a record audience
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tuesday's first game of the Tokyo Series averaged more than 25 million viewers in Japan according to Major League Baseball, making it the most-watched MLB game in the country's history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Colorado Mesa Women's lacrosse team triumphs after early struggles
item.description: The Colorado Mesa University lacrosse team, led by head coach Ashley Delaney, has made a significant jump this season, overcoming a 1-4 start in nonconference play with two statement wins in RMAC competition.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
